name: Cornmeal Pancakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour boiling water over the cornmeal.
2. Add sugar and salt.
3. Let cool.
4. Stir in beaten eggs and oil.
5. In a separate bowl, mix flour and baking powder.
6. Add to the cornmeal mixture alternately with milk.
7. Beat until smooth.
8. Cook on a hot griddle.
